title: Caramel Tart
description: A classic dessert featuring a buttery pastry crust topped with a rich caramel filling.
instructions: Make the pastry crust by combining the flour, sugar, and butter in a bowl until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Press the mixture into a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
Bake the crust for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Let the crust cool completely before filling.
Melt the caramel in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly.
Pour the caramel into the cooled pastry crust.
Bake the tart for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the caramel is set.
Let the tart cool to room temperature before serving.
